title: Database Connector Requests
text: Database Connector Requests Database connector requests are recognized by every Uniface DBMS connector. Each request is identified by an alphabetic character, such as O for Open or S for Select. You need to know these requests and the modes that some of them use, when analyzing I/O messages in the message frame. Connector requests activate application-level processing. You can set parameters on the application level to send I/O messages about the operation of these requests to the message frame. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
